Class: Binding

Extends​

  • BaseClient

Constructors​

Constructor​

new Binding(ctx?, _id?, _asString?, _digest?, _isNull?, _name?, _typeName?): Binding

Constructor is used for internal usage only, do not create object from it.

Parameters​

ctx?​

Context

_id?​

BindingID

_asString?​

string

_digest?​

string

_isNull?​

boolean

_name?​

string

_typeName?​

string

Returns​

Binding
